series_metadata.series_description: Training material and documents created or procured by the agency for agency sponsored trainings. Records may include: curriculums; outlines; programs; training sign-up sheets; sign-in sheets; handouts; manuals; audio-visual materials; training evaluations; and, any other record created and used for agency sponsored training.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: no longer has administrative value or superseded and/or obsolete ; Electronic: no longer has administrative value or superseded and/or obsolete. No Certificate of Record Disposal is necessary when destroying these records
